---
title: "Teaching"
toc: false
---

## KDI School of Public Policy and Management

- Statistical Foundation for Data Scientists
- R Fundamentals for Public Policy
- Machine Learning for Social Scientists
- Text Analysis for Social Scientists

## University of Michigan (graduate student instructor)

- Mathematics for Political Scientists --- with Prof. Iain Osgood
- Statistical Methods in Political Research II --- with Prof. Kevin Quinn
- Politics of International Economic Relations --- with Prof. Iain Osgood
- Game Theory and Models --- with Prof. Iain Osgood
- Advanced Topics in Quantitative Methodology --- with Prof. Yuki Shiraito
- Quantitative Empirical Methods of Political Science --- with Prof. Robert Franzese
